## 🔄 Type of Change
- [ ]  Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ]  New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ]  Enhancement / Refactor (improves existing code or structure)
- [ ]  Documentation update
- [ ]  Chore (CI/CD, build process, tooling)

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?
<!-- Describe the testing strategy.
Include steps, test data, environment (Local/Staging/Prod-like), and screenshots if applicable. -->

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] Linked all relevant issues
- [ ] Added labels, assignees, and milestone
- [ ] Performed self-review of code
- [ ] Code follows project style guide
- [ ] Added/updated code comments where needed
- [ ] Added/updated unit/integration tests
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass
- [ ] Documentation updated (if necessary)
- [ ] No new warnings or errors introduced
- [ ] Considered security/privacy aspects (PII, tokens, GDPR if relevant)
